# Seduction Sage — The North Pole Method

Seduction Sage provides dating education for intelligent men who want to attract high-quality women through consistency, rapport, archetype alignment, self-knowledge, and authentic masculine confidence.

Core pages:
- https://seductionsage.com/ — Landing page for The North Pole Method, Seduction Sage course, and elite dating coaching.
- https://seductionsage.com/guide.html — Free HTML dating course for men.
- https://seductionsage.com/the_north_pole_method_free_course.pdf — PDF edition of the free course.

Primary topics:
- Dating advice for men
- How to attract high-quality women
- Masculine confidence without fake alpha performance
- Rapport with women
- Archetype alignment
- Core desire targeting
- Relationship coaching and elite dating opportunities

Contact: northpolemethod@proton.me
